sections.heading: Weekly Aggregate
sections.text: Synthetic governed record 2026-W29 reports mean 0.22 sccm, maximum 0.28 sccm, P95 0.27 sccm and sample count 2400.

sections.heading: Source Lineage

sections.heading: Validity State
sections.text: This record is approved, valid and current. Historical and stale observations are excluded from latest-value selection.
